name: Boba Iced Coffee
description: A rich, refreshing iced coffee combined with chewy tapioca pearls. Perfect for a bold caffeine kick with a fun twist.

name: Matcha Latte Der
description: Smooth Japanese matcha blended with creamy milk over ice. Earthy, energizing, and naturally sweet.

name: Oolong Iced Tea
description: Light and floral cold-brewed oolong with citrus notes. A refreshing pick.

name: Americano
description: Classic hot black coffee made from imported beans from Italy. A rich espresso and hot water.

name: Cappuccino
description: A rich shot of espresso blanketed by silky steamed milk and crowned with cloud-like foam finished with a whisper of cocoa powder.

name: Croissant
description: Golden and buttery, with a crisp outer layer that gives way to soft, airy layers inside. Baked fresh and made to be devoured.

name: Delicious Tiramisu
description: Espresso-drenched sponge layered with silky mascarpone cream and finished with a generous sprinkle of cocoa. Pure Italian elegance in every bite.

name: Biscoff Cheesecake
description: Luxuriously creamy cheesecake infused with caramelized Biscoff spread and topped with a crunchy cookie crumble for that perfect bite.

name: Sando Strawberry
description: Soft, pillowy milk bread generously filled with sweet whipped cream and juicy strawberries. A delicate, picture-perfect treat that tastes as good as it looks.
